findings.what: Placed single 'San Francisco Giants +1.5' (MLB Spread, San Francisco Giants @ Atlanta Braves) from 2026-06-16's card has no settled record in history.json.
findings.why: A placed bet that never settled means yesterday's P&L is understated and the by-sport/confidence tiles are missing it.
findings.fix: Re-run the workflow (settlement retries). If it persists, the ESPN team-name match likely failed in _find_game_score — verify the game's team names.

findings.what: Prop 'Ozzie Albies Hits Over' from 2026-06-16 has no record at all in prop_history.json (not even pending).
findings.why: A prop with no record was lost between selection and settlement — missing from the prop-accuracy tracker entirely.
findings.fix: Check prop_history.json for the player; if absent, the prop settlement loop didn't pick it up (name-match or sport-routing issue).

findings.what: 2026-06-16 had 5 placed single(s) but only 4 settled (1 unaccounted).
findings.why: A gap between placed and settled singles is the signature of the 'dropped bet' class (e.g. a graduated sport excluded from a hardcoded list).
findings.fix: See the dropped_bet findings above for specifics; if none, a game may be postponed/not yet final.
